title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
summary_full: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.
summary_public: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
